# Lab Index

Deep-linked navigator for the **4 lab walkthroughs**, grouped by module in a foundations-to-advanced order. Each lab links its walkthrough and paired quiz.

Generated from the files on disk — see [README.md](README.md) for the narrative catalog.

## Start here

- **New to PKI?** Work top-down through the modules. Each lab pairs 1:1 with an external guide (the guide teaches the concept; the lab makes you type the keystrokes).
- **Have a specific goal?** Jump via the table below — it maps each module to the `LAB_PROFILE` (or specific component) you need running.

## By profile or component

Which `LAB_PROFILE` — or specific host/component — a module's labs need running. Entries that name a host (e.g. `apps1`, `web1`, `scanner1`, `tomcat1`) are `LAB_COMPONENTS`, not `LAB_PROFILE` names; bring up a profile that includes that host (e.g. `full`).

| Profile or component | Modules |
|---|---|
| `ad-cs-two-tier` | AD CS functional test |
